pages.raw_text:
DR.. p. 8. Byrne, candidate for
congress on the democratic ticket,
will leave tomorrow night for Ia.
coma and other cities on the Sound.
While in Tacoma DR.. Byrne will at
tend meeting Of congressional
candidates. An effort is being made
to induce President Gompers, OF
the American Federation of Labor,
and w. ]. Bryan to make speeches
in this state. 1t is said that there
is likelihood Of these famous ora
tors being heard in the interest of
the democratic ticket. President
Gompers is particularly anxious to
defeat Congressman Jones on &C
count of his attitude on laws advo-
Gated by labor in congress.


1t is probable that DR.. Byrne will
leave his campaign in this county
in the hands of his friends and
make personal canvass on the
Sound and throughout the state.
